scripts.build: npm run minify-css && npm run optimize-images
scripts.optimize-images: mkdir -p ./images/300 ./images/600 ./images/900 && magick mogrify -path ./images/300 -resize "300x>" -quality 100 -define webp:method=6 -format webp ./images/*.jpg && magick mogrify -path ./images/600 -resize "600x>" -quality 100 -define webp:method=6 -format webp ./images/*.jpg && magick mogrify -path ./images/900 -resize "900x>" -quality 100 -define webp:method=6 -format webp ./images/*.jpg
